params.name: Caspian Sea Monster
params.description:
On Jun 30, 1966 AD, the Caspian Sea Monster successfully completed its first flight.
The Caspian Sea Monster is a ground-effect vehicle designed by the former Soviet Union. Due to its large size and its first discovery in the Caspian Sea area, it is nicknamed the Caspian Sea Monster. With the help of the ground effect, it can fly at speeds close to that of an airplane within a range near the ground surface. It not only stays in the radar blind zone but also leaves no traces on the water surfa …
